title: ICAR-IARI – Junior Research Fellow and Scientific & Administrative Assistant or Field Worker – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Scientific Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 is now open for 2 Junior Research Fellow and Scientific & Administrative Assistant or Field Worker posts for candidates with Master’s degree in Life Sciences or Graduation in any discipline. Applications can be submitted via email mode till 15 June 2026 through the official website iari.res.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Genetics/Plant Pathology/Virology/Molecular Biology/Biotechnology/any relevant discipline of Life Sciences, Graduate in any discipline

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
